verified_bsc_supply_edges.finding: Second verified 500k CELL route from 0xda8a... to Gate.io-labelled endpoint.

highlighted_finding.name: Verified BSC mint-supply path reaches Gate.io-labelled endpoint
highlighted_finding.conclusion: Verified Gate.io-bound route exposure from traced BSC supply paths is now at least 2,596,567.55 CELL. This proves routing into a Gate.io-labelled custody endpoint, not exact realized sale proceeds, because exchange-internal trading is off-chain.
